bird.name: 百慕大海燕
bird.summary: 百慕達海燕（學名：Pterodroma cahow、英語：Bermuda Petrel）是一種虻圆尾鸌（Gadfly petrel），在百慕達因其怪異的叫聲而被稱為Cahow。百慕達海燕為夜行性、在地上築巢的海鳥，是百慕達的國鳥，也是自然保育希望的象徵之一，因為牠本來被認為在3…

relations.subject: 百慕大海燕
relations.evidence: The petrel's vulnerability has drastically increased due to substantial damage to its habitats and nesting sites by tropical storms and climate change
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

relations.subject: 百慕大海燕
relations.evidence: Another factor may be that the cahow will have an increased risk of extinction because of restricted ranges, small population sizes, and lower genetic diversity
relations.object_summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。
